title: Alt-text batch 3: Library of Congress prints and photographs
context: Blind/low-vision learners need image descriptions for openly-licensed media. CC/public-domain sources ONLY; record each image's licence + attribution. Documentation only — do not host the images.
objective: Write accurate alt-text + long descriptions for a batch of images from "Library of Congress prints and photographs" and prepare them for upstream contribution.
acceptanceCriteria: Each image: concise alt-text + a long description (objective, factual)
Per-image source licence (CC/PD) and attribution recorded
Low-confidence/sensitive images flagged for human review
